commands.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "Permission Audit Claude Review Packet Decision Binding" packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js

preliminary_expected_failures.failure_reason: CP00-079 evidence files were not created yet; contract and closeout rows already pointed at docs/closeout-packs/cp00-079. A transient minimum_closeout_status regression identified by Claude P3-F1 was fixed before evidence closeout.
docs/closeout-packs/cp00-079/manifest.json did not exist before pack evidence creation.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json "$(cat /tmp/cp00-079-review-prompt.txt)"

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: One valid claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed before production_ready.
evidence_summary.upstream_boundary: CP00-079 consumes CP00-078 and requires upstream next_subphase RP00.P06.M08.S09.
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval and Claude review packet decision binding remain metadata-only; this pack creates no runtime review queue, approval record, notification, evidence write, or product-state write.
evidence_summary.ldip_boundary: LDIP remains planning-only; no LDIP implementation is introduced by CP00-079.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-079 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime Claude review, runtime permission, AuthZ, security trimming, audit, Hermes evidence packet writes, command evidence writes, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, approval, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.

plan_generation_receipt.purpose: Regenerate closeout pack plan and next-pack queue after CP00-079 evidence assembly.
plan_generation_receipt.result_summary: Plan generated with 1174 packs and 53819 units; next queue starts after CP00-079.
